description: Phase WL.3 - per-backend opt-in for the LLM stage-1 web-components augmenter. When enabled, the harness runs an extra LLM call BEFORE the main generation step. It sees the goal + the deterministic matcher's recipe pick + the tight catalog index, and may add components to the selection. Example: 'speed chess with countdown clock' matches recipe.chess (no timer-ring) and the augmenter adds ui.timer-ring so the wizard imports the canonical component instead of reinventing a clock. Off by default everywhere. Graduate per-backend once veracity stabilizes (analogous to disclosure/cli-mode.json LF.3 model).

graduationCriteria.summary: A backend graduates from disabled to enabled for an artifact type when the augmenter's add-rate produces measurable component-reuse-hint hits without regressing recipe-match accuracy. Track via ComponentUsageLedger + augmentation outcome telemetry.
graduationCriteria.manualOverride: Operators can pin via DynamicConfigService key augment.<backend>.<artifactType>.modeOverride = enabled | disabled.

miniApp.rationale: Default off until stage-1 picker ships end-to-end. Claude CLI's tool-call veracity is high; expected first graduation target once telemetry confirms add-rate.
Default off; mirrors Claude's planned rollout.
Unknown backends default to disabled. The deterministic matcher's pick is used as-is.
